landing.title: OpenPlaud / Riffado
landing.subtitle: Open-source AI transcription companion for voice recorders.
landing.desc: Bring your own AI provider, own your transcripts, self-host or hosted.
landing.rebrandNote: OpenPlaud is now Riffado! The open-source project is under active development.
landing.featureSubtitle: Take complete ownership of your recordings, transcripts, and AI keys.

features.privacyDesc: Self-host on your own infrastructure. All credentials encrypted at rest via AES-256-GCM.
features.pluggableDesc: Use any OpenAI-compatible AI provider (DeepSeek, Groq, Ollama) or S3 storage.
features.browserDesc: Transcribe free in your browser using Transformers.js Whisper — no API costs, 100% private.

featuresSection.title: A workstation around the recorder you already have.
featuresSection.desc: Your recorder keeps recording. Riffado picks up after the audio leaves the device — and lets you pick the AI, the storage, and where it all lives.
featuresSection.footerNote: Free in your browser. Or plug in OpenAI or Groq and pay them directly.

b1.title: Sign in once, sync forever.
b1.body: Log in with the same email you use for your recorder — Riffado sends you a code, just like the app. New recordings show up on their own, and you get a notification when they're ready.

b2.title: Pick the AI. Get the transcript.
b2.body: Use OpenAI or Groq for transcription, plug in Anthropic or others for summaries — you pay them directly at their published rate. No account anywhere? Transcription runs free, right in your browser. Every recording comes back with a summary, key points, and action items.

b3.title: Search, listen, send it anywhere.
b3.body: Player and transcript side-by-side. Search across every word you've ever recorded. Send a single recording to Notion, Obsidian, or your video editor — or download everything as one archive. Open source, end to end.

deploy.title: One command. Your server. Yours forever.
deploy.desc: Riffado ships as a Docker Compose stack — the app, a database, your storage. Move from Hosted whenever you want via full-archive export. Same source, your machine.
points: AGPL-3.0 — full source on GitHub, no proprietary fork
No telemetry, no phone home, no license server
Local disk, or push to Cloudflare R2, Backblaze B2, or AWS S3
Bring OpenAI or Groq for cloud transcription — or run Whisper and Ollama locally

hero.desc: Sync in the background, transcribe with the AI you choose — or free in your browser with Whisper — and keep your audio where you choose.

footer.desc: Open-source transcription for the voice recorder you already own. Your recordings, your transcripts, yours to keep.
footer.compliance: Riffado is not HIPAA or SOC 2 certified. For regulated work, self-host and plug in an AI provider that signs a BAA you've reviewed, or run a local model that never leaves your machine.
footer.builtInOpen: Built in the open on GitHub

faq.title: Questions before you sign up.
faq.subtitle: The honest answers — including the boring ones.

theMath.title: Buy the AI directly. Pay what the provider charges.
theMath.desc: Most voice-AI services don't transcribe audio themselves — OpenAI, Groq, and Deepgram do. Riffado connects you to those providers directly, with your own key.
theMath.workload: Same workload · 20 hours of audio (1,200 minutes)
theMath.publishedPricing: Published pricing as of May 2026. Plans, minute ceilings, and trademarks belong to their respective owners; shown for descriptive context, not comparison. Riffado itself is free to self-host.

options.browserScope: Whisper via Transformers.js, no key required

forProfessionals.title: If your conversations stay in the room, your recordings should too.

infrastructure.headline: Runs where you put it.
infrastructure.body: Local disk, your own S3 bucket, or our hosted tier. Recordings sit on storage you control.

source.headline: Auditable, line by line.
source.body: Every line of Riffado is AGPL-3.0. Read it, fork it, show clients exactly what it does.

ai.headline: Yours, including local.
ai.body: Run Whisper locally via Ollama — recordings never leave the machine. Or plug in any OpenAI-compatible cloud.

forProfessionals.contact: Need an air-gapped or in-house setup? Write to {email} — I'll reply personally.

pricing.title: Pick the version that fits you.
pricing.desc: Same product, same source. The only difference is who runs the server — and whether you'd rather not think about it.
pricing.bottomNote: Hosted runs the exact AGPL-3.0 source you can self-host — no hidden fork, no proprietary add-ons. {readSourceLink}. You can move between Hosted and Self-host at any time using full-archive export.

selfHost.name: Self-host
selfHost.tagline: Your machine, your data, your rules.
features: Runs on your laptop, NAS, or VPS via Docker
Plug in OpenAI, Groq, Ollama — or transcribe free in your browser
Store locally, or push to Cloudflare R2, Backblaze B2, or AWS S3

hostedFree.name: Hosted Free
hostedFree.tagline: We run the server. You bring the keys.
features: Plug in OpenAI or Groq for cloud transcription
Export everything anytime — JSON, TXT, SRT, VTT

hostedPro.name: Hosted Pro
hostedPro.tagline: Hosted, with the rough edges paid for.
features: Email support from the people who build it
Early access to new device support

finalCta.title: Stop renting your own voice.
finalCta.desc: Your recordings, your transcripts, your AI. Yours to keep.
finalCta.ctaAria: Start Riffado free — no card required

recordingList.emptyDesc: Connect your Plaud account or upload an audio file to get started.

player.title: Recording Workstation
player.waveformTooltip: Decode waveform in your browser (may take a few seconds)

transcription.title: Transcription
transcription.empty: No transcription yet. Use the Transcribe button above.

summary.title: Summary
summary.empty: No summary yet. Click "Summarize" to generate one.

settings.title: Settings
settings.uiLanguageDesc: Choose your preferred user interface language.
settings.autoDeleteDesc: Automatically delete local files after sync or a custom retention period.

onboarding.welcomeDesc: Let's connect your Plaud device and set up your transcription flow.
onboarding.regionDesc: Select the API server region for your account.
onboarding.setupCompleteDesc: Your Riffado instance is ready. Start syncing your voice recordings.
